Comment.MultiLanguageText: HMI: Manual mode selector (TRUE = manual cmds active, FALSE = ignored). Mutex with GDB_MachineCmd.bo_Mode — operator must turn AUTO off before enabling MANUAL. FB_ManualCtrl REGION 1 gates all manual actions on (bo_Mode AND bo_ESTOP_LOCK AND NOT GDB_MachineCmd.bo_Mode).
Safety: E-Stop chain healthy (TRUE = OK, FALSE = E-Stop active). Mirrors GDB_MachineCmd.bo_ESTOP_LOCK convention.
HMI manual: J1 Enable button. Routes via FB_ManualCtrl REGION 2 to GDB_Control.enableAxes (group-level; enabling J1 enables all 4 joints together — see PLC_HANDOFF_2026-05-18_C67 §Risk-7).
HMI manual: J2 Enable button (routes to group). See bo_J1_Enable.
HMI manual: J3 Enable button (routes to group). See bo_J1_Enable.
HMI manual: J4 Enable button (routes to group). See bo_J1_Enable.
HMI manual: J1 Home button. Routes via FB_ManualCtrl REGION 2 to GDB_Control.homeAxes (group-level; sets all 4 joint actuals to HomePos via MC_Home Mode=7).
HMI manual: J2 Home button (routes to group).
HMI manual: J3 Home button (routes to group).
HMI manual: J4 Home button (routes to group).
HMI manual: J1 Reset button. Routes via FB_ManualCtrl REGION 2 to GDB_Control.resetAxes (group-level; pulses MC_Reset on all 4 joints + kin TO).
HMI manual: J2 Reset button (routes to group).
HMI manual: J3 Reset button (routes to group).
HMI manual: J4 Reset button (routes to group).

HMI manual: J1 Jog-Forward HOLD button (level-triggered). FB_ManualCtrl REGION 3 routes via XOR safety to MC_MoveJog.JogForward on J1_SCARA_Arm3D at 10°/s default. Releasing the button decelerates to standstill.
HMI manual: J1 Jog-Backward HOLD button (level-triggered). See bo_J1_JogForward. If both forward + backward held simultaneously, XOR safety in REGION 3 makes neither direction win.
HMI manual: J2 Jog-Forward HOLD button. See bo_J1_JogForward.
HMI manual: J2 Jog-Backward HOLD button. See bo_J1_JogBackward.
HMI manual: J3 Jog-Forward HOLD button. See bo_J1_JogForward.
HMI manual: J3 Jog-Backward HOLD button. See bo_J1_JogBackward.
HMI manual: J4 Jog-Forward HOLD button. See bo_J1_JogForward.
HMI manual: J4 Jog-Backward HOLD button. See bo_J1_JogBackward.

HMI manual: operator-set Kin target X coordinate (mm in WCS). Consumed by FB_ManualCtrl REGION 4 on bo_KinGo rising edge, passed to MC_MoveLinearAbsolute on ScaraArm3D. StartValue 1500.0 = ABCDE A-point safe default.
HMI manual: operator-set Kin target Y coordinate (mm in WCS). See cfgKinTargetX.
HMI manual: operator-set Kin target Z coordinate (mm in WCS). See cfgKinTargetX.
HMI manual: operator-set Kin target A orientation (degrees). See cfgKinTargetX.

HMI manual: rising-edge → trigger MC_MoveLinearAbsolute on ScaraArm3D to (cfgKinTargetX, Y, Z, A). FB_ManualCtrl REGION 4 uses BufferMode=0 (aborting) for clean handoff from any in-flight auto motion.
HMI manual: Kin-group Enable button. Routes via FB_ManualCtrl REGION 2 to GDB_Control.enableAxes. Functionally equivalent to bo_J1_Enable (group-level wiring).
HMI manual: Kin-group Home button. Routes via FB_ManualCtrl REGION 2 to GDB_Control.homeAxes.
HMI manual: Kin-group Reset button. Routes via FB_ManualCtrl REGION 2 to GDB_Control.resetAxes.

AttributeList.Text: Phase G (C67, 2026-05-18) — Manual-mode command surface. Sibling to GDB_MachineCmd (auto) + GDB_Control (axis-group). HMI binds the 20 per-axis cmd buttons + 4 Kin target IOFields + 4 Kin group buttons here. FB_ManualCtrl on OB30 (10ms cyclic) consumes these and routes to MC_MoveJog / MC_MoveLinearAbsolute / GDB_Control flags.
